grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Multiple specific references to CA 4.0 throughout response

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Clearly states 4-year rule for operational development like building extensions

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Discusses indemnity insurance for works >12 months and <4 years, and mentions regularisation certificate as alternative

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Explicitly states planning and building regs are separate checks and provides detailed building regs analysis

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Lists all three enforcement periods: 4-year, 10-year, and 12-month rules with explanations
